name: 刘明
bio: 刘明，以雷电之力横扫战场的战士。他以迅雷不及掩耳之势发动攻击，以雷霆之力震慑敌人。
bio_en: Liuming, a warrior who sweeps the battlefield with lightning power. He attacks with the speed of lightning, intimidating enemies with thunderous force.
story: 刘明，以雷电之力横扫战场的战士。他以迅雷不及掩耳之势发动攻击，以雷霆之力震慑敌人，是战场上速度最快的存在之一。

skills.skill_description: 以雷电之力向前冲刺，对路径上的敌人造成伤害并使其眩晕。冷却20秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Dash forward with lightning power, damaging and stunning enemies in the path. Cooldown: 20s.

skills.skill_description: 以雷电之力向前冲刺，可连续冲刺两次，对路径上的敌人造成伤害。冷却25秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Dash forward with lightning power, can dash twice consecutively, damaging enemies in the path. Cooldown: 25s.

skills.skill_description: 召唤雷神之力，对范围内所有敌人造成大量雷电伤害，并使其眩晕。怒气上限75000。
skills.skill_description_en: Summon the power of the Thunder God, dealing massive lightning damage to all enemies in range and stunning them. Rage limit: 75000.

skills.skill_description: 召唤强化雷神之力，对范围内所有敌人造成大量雷电伤害，同时提升自身攻击力。怒气上限75000。
skills.skill_description_en: Summon enhanced Thunder God power, dealing massive lightning damage to all enemies while boosting own attack. Rage limit: 75000.
